attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-03-00230 - SEQ is provisional; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-DERM-03 bucket.
Age inferred as ~7 years from a stated weight of 25 kg (child age band) - clinician to confirm.

Sex at birth NOT stated in the source note (gender-neutral 'them/their' throughout); assigned 'male' solely for schema conformance (demographics.sex_at_birth is required) - has no bearing on management; clinician to confirm/correct.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person after-hours residential visit with clinician physical examination (palpation for induration/fluctuance, close-inspection umbilication) and measured vitals. Clinician-only findings (absence of induration/fluctuance/streaking, precise vitals) sealed in 10/11 telehealth_limits; caregiver/patient-obtainable data (home thermometer, video-observable rash, limp) placed in 01.objective_data_offered.
Paediatric dosing: no paracetamol dose synthesised (weight-based) - management flags it for pharmacist/in-person dosing per §8.

SNOMED CT-AU / ICD-10-AM codes are candidates from model knowledge (molluscum 30242009 / B08.1; cellulitis 128045006; abscess 128477000) - all unverified pending terminology receipt. AMT codes for hydrocortisone/paracetamol/zinc oxide omitted rather than fabricated.
difficulty_tier set to red_herring_laden: the acute painful erythematous flare is a red herring for bacterial cellulitis; the reasoning task is over-triage/over-treatment resistance.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
